intro: Between 18 and 24 April 2026, ZCyberNews published six articles under the zdi tag, covering five high-severity vulnerabilities and one critical issue. The top CVEs identified include CVE-2026-22898, CVE-2026-6406, CVE-2026-25203, CVE-2026-5424, and CVE-2025-71066, with scores ranging from 7.5 to 8.8. These flaws affected sectors such as critical infrastructure, digital signage, energy, enterprise, and industrial control systems on a global scale.
